# pfsense_system_advanced_admin (Resource)

[System advanced admin access](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/config/advanced/admin.html) configuration including webConfigurator, SSH, login protection, serial console, and console settings. This is a **singleton** resource — only one instance can exist per pfSense installation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage system advanced admin access settings
resource "pfsense_system_advanced_admin" "this" {
  webgui_protocol = "https"
  webgui_port     = 443
  max_processes   = 2

  roaming            = true
  login_autocomplete = true
  page_name_first    = false

  ssh_enabled           = true
  sshd_key_only         = "disabled"
  sshd_agent_forwarding = false
  ssh_port              = 22

  serial_speed    = 115200
  primary_console = "video"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `alternate_hostnames` (String) Space-separated list of alternate hostnames for the webConfigurator DNS rebind and HTTP_REFERER checks.
- `apply` (Boolean) Apply change, defaults to `true`.
- `disable_anti_lockout` (Boolean) Disable the webConfigurator anti-lockout rule.
- `disable_console_menu` (Boolean) Disable console menu (password protect the console menu).
- `disable_dns_rebind_check` (Boolean) Disable DNS rebinding attack check on the webConfigurator.
- `disable_hsts` (Boolean) Disable HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) on the webConfigurator.
- `disable_http_redirect` (Boolean) Disable the HTTP to HTTPS redirect on the webConfigurator when HTTPS is enabled.
- `disable_http_referer_check` (Boolean) Disable HTTP_REFERER enforcement check on the webConfigurator.
- `login_autocomplete` (Boolean) Enable login autocomplete on the webConfigurator login page.
- `login_protection_blocktime` (Number) Duration in seconds to block after exceeding threshold. Set to 0 for the pfSense default (120).
- `login_protection_detection_time` (Number) Detection time window in seconds. Set to 0 for the pfSense default (1800).
- `login_protection_pass_list` (String) Space-separated list of IP addresses or CIDR networks to whitelist from login protection.
- `login_protection_threshold` (Number) Number of failed login attempts before blocking. Set to 0 for the pfSense default (30).
- `max_processes` (Number) Maximum number of webConfigurator processes. Defaults to '2'.
- `ocsp_staple` (Boolean) Enable OCSP stapling on the webConfigurator.
- `page_name_first` (Boolean) Display page name first in the browser tab title.
- `primary_console` (String) Primary console. Options: `serial`, `video`. Defaults to `video`.
- `quiet_login` (Boolean) Disable logging of webConfigurator successful logins.
- `roaming` (Boolean) Allow webConfigurator session roaming between IP addresses. Defaults to 'true'.
- `serial_speed` (Number) Serial port speed in bps. Options: `115200`, `57600`, `38400`, `19200`, `14400`, `9600`. Defaults to `115200`.
- `serial_terminal` (Boolean) Enable serial terminal.
- `ssh_enabled` (Boolean) Enable Secure Shell (SSH) server.
- `ssh_port` (Number) SSH TCP port. Set to 0 for the default port (22).
- `sshd_agent_forwarding` (Boolean) Enable SSH agent forwarding.
- `sshd_key_only` (String) SSH authentication method. Options: `disabled`, `enabled`, `both`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `ssl_certificate` (String) SSL certificate reference ID for HTTPS. Only applicable when webgui_protocol is 'https'.
- `webgui_port` (Number) WebGUI TCP port. Set to 0 for the default port (80 for HTTP, 443 for HTTPS).
- `webgui_protocol` (String) WebGUI protocol. Options: `http`, `https`. Defaults to `http`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import pfsense_system_advanced_admin.this system_advanced_admin
```
